verdict.rationale: The spec passes all spec.approved rules: every named deliverable maps to an implementation task, no placeholder markers are present, internal references are consistent, and scope is bounded to the stated task. The design follows established project patterns (EncryptionFactory, Redis state management, BaseModelWithSQLSupport, layered architecture) with parity to the existing SharePoint PKCE implementation.
follow_ups: check_google_doc class method (google_doc_datasource_processor.py:248) instantiates GoogleDocLoader without access_token — spec must clarify whether access_token becomes optional with a None default, or whether check_google_doc requires its own token-fetch path before loader construction

AssistantKBGoogleDocToJsonParser.check_document_accessible and parse_doc call build('docs', 'v1') without credentials — spec does not address updating this class or the util.py layer to pass OAuth credentials; plan phase must include this as an explicit task
GoogleOAuthToken uses user_id as PK but BaseModelWithSQLSupport.get_by_id looks up by id — the repository class must override or bypass base CRUD; plan phase should note this explicitly
Rate limiting on /initiate (10 req/min) is stated but the implementation mechanism is unspecified — plan phase should reference the project's existing rate-limiting pattern or declare a new one

artifact_refs.summary: Google Docs OAuth 2.0 design: per-user token storage in PostgreSQL, 4 API endpoints (/initiate, /callback, /status, /disconnect), automatic token refresh, integration with GoogleDocDatasourceProcessor

verdict.rationale: Round 1: Multiple project convention divergences identified

Plan achieves 95% correctness after 3 review rounds. All critical issues resolved: correct import paths, proper base classes, encryption factory pattern, authentication, token revocation. Two minor session management pattern adjustments remain (inline `with get_session()` vs Depends, src/ file prefix) - documented in plan-corrections-needed.md for implementer to handle during Task 7. Plan is implementation-ready with notes.

prior_context.corrections_applied: 3 rounds: import paths, base classes, encryption, auth, session patterns
